title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Finolex Industries
jsonLd.description:
Finolex Industries has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Noida office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Finolex Industries:
Finolex Industries is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Finolex Industries!
